_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Importantly, this diet is commonly used to induce obesity, insulin-resistance, and hyperglycemia in C57BL/6J mice
details: Commonly used strain for inducing obesity, insulin-resistance, and hyperglycemia with high-glucose diet
